_note: Metadata-only slice of the OpenTabs sentry plugin, vendored hermetically at SHA 4b17021637d2cac12b8d84d21c40e765aa7b85e9 (see vendor/opentabs-snapshot/PIN.md). Wall 1: NO dist/, NO handle() runtime is executed -- the importer (scripts/import-opentabs-catalog.mjs) reads ONLY .name/.description/.input/.group/.summary metadata. The opentabs.urlPatterns below is the AUTHORITATIVE upstream value (*://sentry.io/* -> service sentry.io -> derived stem 'sentry'; NOT in STEM_OVERRIDES because the host derives correctly). defineTool/OpenTabsPlugin and the api transport helper are resolved from local stubs (sdk-stub.ts, sentry-api.ts) so the importer's import() never drags the real SDK's DOM/fetch surface into node. sentry.resolve_issue carries a {method:'PUT'} signal so it classes write (`resolve` is not in the shared verb sets -- the method literal floors it).
name: @opentabs-dev/opentabs-plugin-sentry
